seo.title: Cedar Tutoring Academy Locations
seo.description: Find a Cedar Tutoring Academy location near you in Plano, Frisco, or Richardson, with convenient after-school hours and transportation-friendly support.

hero.heading: Find a Cedar location that fits your family's routine.
hero.subtitle: Explore welcoming Cedar tutoring centers across the Dallas–Fort Worth area, with after-school scheduling and transportation support available at select locations.

intro.heading: Local centers designed to make strong academic support easier to reach.
intro.subtitle: Each Cedar location offers the same warm teaching approach, flexible evening availability, and thoughtful communication families count on.
paragraphs: Cedar serves families across the Dallas–Fort Worth area with neighborhood-friendly locations that keep tutoring close to school, home, and after-school activities.
Whether you need a nearby center, weekend availability, or help with transportation logistics, we'll guide you toward the location and schedule that feel most realistic for your family.
intro.transportationNote: Transportation support is available for select service areas. During your assessment, we'll confirm availability and help you choose the easiest location for pickup, drop-off, and session consistency.

locationsSection.heading: Three Cedar locations, each built for steady after-school support.
locationsSection.subtitle: Compare hours, neighborhoods served, and transportation availability to find the best match for your schedule.

finalCta.heading: Not sure which location is best for your child?
finalCta.subtext: Book a free assessment and we'll recommend the Cedar center, schedule, and support plan that fit your family's goals and logistics.
